title: merremia hirta var. hirta
intro: Merremia hirta var. hirta, also known as the hairy merremia or hairy convolvulus, is a type of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Merremia hirta var. hirta include relief from coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as its potential to lower fever and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Merremia hirta var. hirta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken as capsules, or applied topically to affected areas.
